info.title: OpenAPI.Generator
info.description: .NET tool to generate OpenAPI documents from C# annotations

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: annotation-xml
options.description: Path to a annotation XML documentation file.

options.name: assembly
options.description: Path to the assembly (DLL or EXE) that contains the data types referenced in the comments.

options.name: document-version
options.description: Version of the OpenAPI document. Note this is not the OpenAPI specification version. This corresponds to the version field of the Info object in an OpenAPI document.

options.name: camel-case
options.description: Use camelCase instead of PascalCase for property names in schema.

options.name: output
options.description: Directory in which to place the generated OpenAPI documents.
